heading: Acquisition of buildings in District of Columbia
label: 7780 Acquisition of buildings in District of Columbia
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4780(a)40:37.(3d proviso under “Barracks and Quarters”), .July 9, 1918, ch. 14340 Stat. 8614780(b)40:41.(2d par. under “War Department”), .July 8, 1918, ch. 13940 Stat. 826In subsection (a), the words “may acquire by lease” are substituted for the words “is authorized, in his discretion, to rent or lease”. The word “needed” is substituted for the word “required”.In subsection (b), the words “At any time” are inserted for clarity. The word “may” is substituted for the words “is authorized”. The word “agency” is substituted for the word “branch”. Clause (3) is inserted for clarity. The word “determine” is substituted for the word “ascertain”. The words “out of funds appropriated for the payment of rent by” are substituted for the words “within the limits of the appropriations for rent made by any act making appropriations for”. The word “is” is substituted for the word “be”. The words “so ascertained” and “in the manner provided by sections 41(20) and 250 of Title 28” are omitted as surplusage, since those sections were repealed in 1948 and replaced by sections 1346, 1491, 1496, 1501, 1503, 2401, 2402, and 2501 of that title.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4780 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

children.label: a
children.text: In time of war or when war is imminent, the Secretary of the Army may acquire by lease any building, or part of a building, in the District of Columbia that may be needed for military purposes.
a dwelling house occupied as such;
a building occupied by any other agency of the United States; or
space in such a dwelling house or building.
